title: MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES - 211info
text: RIVERVIEW CENTER FOR GROWTH MOBILE RESPONSE AND STABILIZATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support to children experiencing a mental health crisis. Program crisis workers can provide assistance and referrals to help stabilize the situation, and create a short-term plan. On-site services available for more intensive intervention needs. The team may seek authorization for a brief, voluntary crisis care placement, approved by the parent. 3995 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Families with youth age 20 and younger who are experiencing a mental health crisis Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 989-9990 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (888) 989-9990 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Crisis Residential Treatment General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Youth Issues In Person Crisis Intervention * Youth Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE PROBLEM SOLVING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WELLNESS AND COMMUNITY HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - INTENSIVE SCHOOL AND COMMUNITY BASED PROGRAMS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
